kirundi.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Ntoya < 90°, igororotse = 90°, igari 90–180°, isanzuye = 180°, irenze > 180°. Porotarakteri yahimbwe hafi ya 1801; icitegererezo c'igice-c'uruziga kiracakoreshwa mu ishure ryose rya geometiri.
kirundi.challenges_estimate_classify_measure: Ibibazo — gereranya, shira mu vyiciro, pima
kirundi.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Kugereranya vyubaka kumva umwanya; gupima neza vyubaka akamenyero ka porotarakteri. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: inguni nk'ibice vy'uruziga rwuzuye (1/360 vy'uruziga).
kirundi.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Uzuzanya zigera kuri 90°; unganya kuri 180°; inguni zihanganye zingana; inguni zo mu nda zisimburana zihura iyo imirongo iteganye. Aya makuru ane yugurura ibimenyetso vyinshi by' amashure yisumbuye.
kirundi.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Kugabanyamo-kabiri = gucamo kabiri (kubaka na kompazi + umurongo ugororotse biri muri Euclid Igitabo I, Iciyumviro 9). Ibikoresho bigezweho: porotarakteri, umusumeno wa miter, teodolite — iciyumviro kimwe, gusa cagenwe neza.
kirundi.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Fyonda kugira ngo ubone impanuro z'inguni zawe bwite!
kirundi.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Fyonda kugira ngo ubone impanuro z'inguni zawe bwite!
kirundi.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Raba inguni kuri porotarakteri (umubare wahishwe). Ni dogere zingahe?
kirundi.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Ntoya kuri inguni igororotse. Igice ca pizza, "ntoya kuri kare".
kirundi.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Kigice c'ukuzunguruka. Imirongo ibiri ikora umurongo ugororotse.
kirundi.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Igiteranyo c'inguni zo mu nda = (n − 2) × 180° ku mpande-nyinshi zose z'impande n. Buri nguni yo hanze y'impande-nyinshi ISANZWE = 360°/n. Igiteranyo c'inguni zo hanze buri gihe = 360°.
kirundi.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: Sinusi = Ihanganye/Ipotenuse, Kosinusi = Ibangikanye/Ipotenuse, Tangente = Ihanganye/Ibangikanye. Imimaro ya trigonometiri yerekana ibipimo vy'impande z'umutatu ugororotse; yagejejwe ku nguni zose binyuze mu ruziga rw'urugero.
kirundi.angle_problem_solving_shortcuts: ⚡ Inzira ngufi zo gukemura ibibazo vy'inguni
kirundi.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Icerekezo gipimwa MU CEREKEZO C'ISAHA guhera mu majaruguru. Busole isanzwe y'utudomo 16 ifite 22.5° hagati y'ivyerekezo bikurikirana.
kirundi.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Uburebe butatu bw'iteganya rimwe rya trigonometiri. Kurura umunyerezo w'inguni (canke uburebure bw'umunara) — buri iyerekana rivugurura icarimwe. Hanyuma ukore ikizamini c'ikibazo-gihindutse: kemura igipimo nyakuri ukoresheje iyerekana rimwe gusa.
kirundi.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Hindura inguni maze urabe uko vyose uko ari bitatu bivugurura icarimwe — ibi ni vyo "iciyumviro kimwe, iyerekana ritatu" bisigura.
kirundi.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Impanuro: ongera utegure tan(θ) = ihanganye/ibangikanye — nimba uzi θ n'urubavu rumwe, ushobora kemura urundi. Nimba uzi impande zombi, fata arctan.
kirundi.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Ingano ifite ubunini N'icerekezo vyombi. Ishushanyijwe nk'akambi. Ingero: umuvuduko, imbaraga, iyimuka.
kirundi.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Sukalari = umubare gusa (misa, ubushuhe, igihe). Vegiteri = ubunini + icerekezo.
kirundi.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Shira umurizo wa kabiri ku mutwe wa mbere. Ingaruka = umurizo wa mbere kugeza ku mutwe wa kabiri.
kirundi.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Shira imirizo hamwe. Umurongo-nkiranyi w'igicaparalelo = ingaruka.
kirundi.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagore mu bipimo vyose.
kirundi.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Ubunini 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Kenshi bita "icerekezo" ca v.
kirundi.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Bitanga vegiteri IRINGANIYE ku vyombi. Ubunini = ubuso bw'igicaparalelo.
kirundi.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Zinga intoki uhereye kuri a kugeza kuri b. Igikumwe cerekeza icerekezo ca a×b. (Ibipimo vy'ukuboko kw'iburyo.)
kirundi.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Itegeko rya 2 rya Newton: F = ma. Imbaraga zuzuye ni igiteranyo-vegiteri c'imbaraga zose.
kirundi.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Icerekezo c'indege + vegiteri y'umuyaga → umuvuduko ku butaka (igiteranyo-vegiteri).
kirundi.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Ikweto ridasubiramo — ntirisubiramo neza na rimwe. Bumwe-mpande bwa 5. Vyatumye havumburwa quasicrystals.
kirundi.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Ikweto ry'impande-esheshatu rigabanya umuzenguruko wose ku buso buhawe. Vyagaragajwe na Hales (1999). Impamvu inzuki zikoresha impande-esheshatu.
kirundi.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Buri karere = utudomo turi hafi y'akadomo kamwe k'"imbuto". Bigaragara mu kamere (amabara ya girafe, ivyatsi vy'ibumba, imiterere y'ingirabuzimafatizo).
kirundi.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Kare zifite amabara zigomba guhuza n'abaturanyi ku mpande. Zishobora kwigana imashini ya Turing → ikibazo c'ikweto ntigishobora kwemezwa muri rusange.
kirundi.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Icitegererezo ca 3D co haruguru. Amashununu amwe ni imipira; amashununu ahujwe ahurira ku nguni za 120°.
kirundi.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Ikigereranyo c'ubuki (cagaragajwe 1999 na Hales): ikweto ry'impande-esheshatu rifite uburebure bw'inkuta buke ku buso hagati y'igabanya iryo ari ryo ryose.
kirundi.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Gupakira impande-esheshatu kw'inziga vyuzuza ~90.7% vy'urwego (biboneka). Gupakira kare gusa ~78.5%.
kirundi.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP vyombi bigera kuri ~74% vy'ubwinshi (ikigereranyo ca Kepler, cagaragajwe 2014 na Hales).
kirundi.tetrahedron_is_simplest: Tetraedero ni yo yoroshe kurusha izindi
kirundi.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Umuverure w'ubugari buhoraho (atari uruziga!). Ushobora kuzengeza igati ku maroleri atatu ya Reuleaux neza. Ivyuma vyo gutobora bibikoresha.
kirundi.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Impande-nyinshi ebyiri ziteganye zizengurutswe 360°/2n, zihujwe n'imitatu. Tetraedero ni antipurizimu yoroshe kurusha izindi.
kirundi.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Ifite chiralité — imiterere y'ukuboko kw'ibumoso + kw'iburyo. Kimwe mu bintu bibiri vya chiral vya Archimède (ikindi ni dodekaedero y'isnabu).
kirundi.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Ta spaghetti nta gahunda — impuzandengo y'umubare w'ahantu bihurira = (L/πd) × π × n. Bikoreshwa mu kubara π mu ishure.
kirundi.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Rigire ryoroshe (umwana ashobora kurishushanya mu mutwe), koresha ikimenyetso gifite ubusobanuro, amabara y'ibanze 2-3, nta nyuguti canke ikirango, gire uburyo budasanzwe.
kirundi.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Ibimenyetso vyongewe ku bendera (inyenyeri, imisaraba, inyamaswa). Amagambo ya heraldike asigura aho biri.
kirundi.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Kare-refu yo hejuru-ibumoso (hafi 1/4 vy'ibendera). Inyenyeri z'Amerika zinjira hano. Ositaraliya, NZ nazo zikoresha imiterere ya canton.
kirundi.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Umutuku = ubutwari, impinduramatwara, amaraso. Ubururu = inyanja, ikirere, ubwisanzure. Icatsi = ubutaka, kamere, Isilamu. Umweru = amahoro, ubuziranenge. Umuhondo/Zahabu = ubukungu, izuba.
kirundi.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Kumanika ibendera hejuru-hasi (aho ridahwanya mpande); kumanika ibendera ku gice c'igiti = kwibuka abapfuye.
kirundi.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Ubururu bworoheje bufite ikarita (LONI) canke busole (NATO). Ku bushake birinda ibimenyetso vy'igihugu/idini.
kirundi.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Amabendera ni geometiri yanditse. Buri bendera ry'igihugu rifite ibipimo nyavyo: igipimo c'ingano, kode z'amabara, aho ibimenyetso biri, inguni z'inyenyeri.
kirundi.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 bisigura X santimetero zo kuzamuka kuri 12 santimetero zo kwiruka mu buryo butambitse.
kirundi.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Vyasobanuwe neza. Urumuri rufata ~8.3 iminota kwambuka 1 UA.
kirundi.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 UA (2024). Ikintu c'umuvuduko mwinshi cakozwe n'abantu kivuye muri sisitemu y'izuba. Kiracohereza amakuru.
kirundi.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: ~620 miliyoni z'ibiro vya H → He kuri buri segonda. Ritakaza ~4 miliyoni z'ibiro nk'ingufu (E = mc²).
kirundi.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Kubera kw'urumurongo-rwibumba gutera ibihe. Kubera > 90° bisigura kuzunguruka guhindukira (Venus, Uranus, Pluton).
kirundi.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Ushobora kwambuka buri kiraro c'ibiraro 7 vya Königsberg inshuro imwe gusa?
kirundi.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Oya. Euler yagaragaje (1736) ko usaba buri nodi kugira urwego rw'igiharwe, uretse ahari nodi 2 z'urwego rw'igiharwe-kidasanzwe. Königsberg yari ifite nodi 4 z'urwego kidasanzwe. Vyashinze teoriya y'imirongo-mvimvi.
kirundi.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Yego. Vyagaragajwe na Appel + Haken (1976) — iciyumviro gikomeye ca mbere cagaragajwe hifashishijwe mudasobwa.
kirundi.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Ni iyihe nzira iva A ija B (B iri hasi) igabanya igihe c'ikintu kinyerera hasi ku mbaraga rukuruzi?
kirundi.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloïde. Cabajijwe na Bernoulli (1696). Cakemuwe na Newton mu ijoro rimwe + n'abandi 4 barimo Leibniz.
kirundi.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Ni ukuri ku bice vyose vy'igiharwe-kwikuba-4. Bikora kuri 8, 12, 16, ...
kirundi.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Igipimo kiterwa — cakemuwe mu buryo bw'isesengura. Geometiri y'urukundo iva mu gitabo co mu 1942.
kirundi.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Ushobora guca uruziga mu bice ukongera ukabishira mu kare y'ubuso bungana?
kirundi.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Yego (Laczkovich 1990) — n'ibice ~10⁵⁰. Igiteke c'itoranya kirakenewe. Ntushobora gukoresha incisi z'ubwoko bw'imikasi; ibice ni bidasanzwe cane.
kirundi.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Ushobora guca umupira mu bice ukongera ukawushira mu mipira ibiri y'ingano imwe?
kirundi.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Yego — bisaba igiteke c'itoranya + ibice bidashobora gupimwa. Birwanya ubwenge ariko mu mibare ni ukuri.
kirundi.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Ikweto risanzwe ryoroshe kurusha ayandi. Ikimenyetso ca Schläfli {4,4}.
kirundi.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: Impande-esheshatu 3 zikikije buri mpinga. {6,3}. Ubuki. Vyiza kurusha ibindi.
kirundi.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Akoresha ubwoko 2 bw'impinga. 14 atandukanye (bamwe barabija impaka). Agoye kurusha aya Archimède.
kirundi.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Impande-zirindwi (zidashoboka muri Euclide) zivuna urwego rwa hiperubolike hamwe na 3 zikikije buri mpinga. Vyashushanyijwe na Escher.
kirundi.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Amakweto ya kare afite imiverure canke imirongo-nkiranyi. Icerekezo kitagenwe → amashusho nk'ubuyobe.
kirundi.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: Kuri buri mpinga, ukeneye impande-nyinshi 3+ zifite igiteranyo c'inguni < 360° (ntibindi biba isanzuye canke ntibishoboke). Ni ibihuriro 5 gusa bikora ku mpande-nyinshi zisanzwe.
kirundi.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 ni ukuri ku buri mpande-nyinshi iberamye (harimwo ibintu vyose 5 vya Platon).
kirundi.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Guhuza ibigo vy'uburanga bw'ikintu ca Platon bitanga "dual" yaco. Kibe ↔ okitaedero; dodekaedero ↔ ikosaedero; tetraedero ↔ yo ubwayo.
kirundi.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: Ibintu 13 bisanzwe-igice — iboneza rimwe kuri buri mpinga, ariko ubwoko bwinshi bw'impande-nyinshi. Birimwo ikosaedero yakemuwe (ishusho y'umupira w'amaguru).
kirundi.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Tangura n'umutatu. Ku rubavu rumwe rumwe, simbuza igice co hagati impande ebyiri z'umutatu muto. Subiramwo. Umuzenguruko udashira, ubuso bushira.
kirundi.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Tangura n'umutatu. Kuraho umutatu wo hagati (muto). Subiramwo ku mutatu wose usigaye. Ingano ya Hausdorff log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
kirundi.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Kuraho igice ca gatatu co hagati c'umurongo. Subiramwo ku murongo wose usigaye. Ntushobora kubarwa ariko uburebure bwose ni zeru.
kirundi.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Utudomo c aho gusubiramwo z = z² + c bibandanya kuba mu mbibi. Amakuru adashira ku iyaguriro iryo ari ryo ryose. Ryavumbuwe 1980.
kirundi.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: Kuri buri c, utudomo z aho gusubiramwo z = z² + c bibandanya kuba mu mbibi. Buri c gitanga itsinda rya Julia ritandukanye; hamwe bivuna itsinda rya Mandelbrot.
kirundi.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Kunja igice c'urupapuro kabiri kenshi; wugurure buri kunja kuri 90°. Canke gusimbura gusubiramwo kw'imirongo.
kirundi.iterated_function_system_random_select: Sisitemu y'imimaro yo gusubiramwo. Gutoranya nta gahunda amakarita 4 ya affine bitanga ishusho y'iyanana.
kirundi.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Urwego rusanzuye. Iciyumviro-shingiro c'imirongo iteganye kirakora. Inguni z'umutatu ziteranya neza kuri 180°.
kirundi.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: Ku mupira w'umurambararo R, ubuso bw'umutatu = R² × (igiteranyo c'inguni − π).
kirundi.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Igihe c'isaha y'izuba gitandukanye n'igihe c'isaha kugeza ~16 iminota mu mwaka wose. Bitewe n'inzira ya ellipsoïdale y'Isi + kubera k'urumurongo-rwibumba.
kirundi.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Umurongo w'ishusho ya 8 y'aho izuba riri ku isaha imwe buri munsi mu mwaka. Vyerekanwa ku masaha y'izuba amwe agezweho.
kirundi.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Isaha y'izuba yerekana IGIHE C'IZUBA c'aho kigaragara. Gitandukanye n'igihe ca gisivili ku itandukaniro rya longitude mu karere k'igihe + DST.
kirundi.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Umurongo ugabanyijwe ku buryo cose : kinini = kinini : gito. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
kirundi.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Igipimo c'imibare ya Fibonacci ikurikirana kegera φ: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
kirundi.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Umuzingo wa logarithm ufite igipimo c'ubukure φ kuri buri kimwe-ca-kane c'ukuzunguruka. Bigereranywa na kare + imiheto ya Fibonacci.
kirundi.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Ibipimo vy'imirongo-nkiranyi ya pentagramme ku mpande = φ. Pythagore yari abizi.
kirundi.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: Iboneza ry'umuzingo mu ndabyo z'izuba, ibibabi vya pine, amagi ya nautilus. Vyerekana gupakira kwiza ku meristème akura.
kirundi.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: Kenshi bivugwa muri Parthénon, Mona Lisa, n'ibindi — ibivugwa vyinshi ntibishigikiwe. Ubugeni nyabwo bw'igipimo ca zahabu: gukoresha kubishaka mu kinyejana ca 20 (Le Corbusier, Dali).
kirundi.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: Igihe kirekire bemeraga ko abantu babona igipimo ca zahabu ari co ciza kurusha ibindi. Ibimenyetso bikomeye ni bike kuruta uko inkuru zizwi zivuga.
kirundi.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(...))). Umubare udasobanutse kurusha iyindi — igice kibandanya kegereza buhoro kurusha ibindi.
kirundi.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Urupapuro rusanzwe rushobora gukunjwa kabiri ~7 inshuro. Buri kunja rikuba kabiri ubugari. Nyuma ya 7, urupapuro rukomera cane. Rekodi (n'ibikoresho vyihariye + urupapuro runini): amakunja 12.
kirundi.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: Yakunjwe neza kugira ngo ikwire mu cumba, ifungurwa vuba.
kirundi.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: Incisi zemewe hiyongereyeho amakunja. Bikoreshwa mu bitabo bidasimbuka + ivyubatswe vya siyansi.
kirundi.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Imirongo iteganye ihurira ku tudomo tw'ukuzimira. Akadomo 1 (kuraba hasi mu muhanda), utudomo 2 (impinga y'inyubako), utudomo 3 (kuraba hejuru mu munara).
kirundi.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Aho imirongo iteganye igaragara ihurira ku murongo w'ikirere. Bigenwa n'aho urabira + icerekezo c'umurongo.
kirundi.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Umurongo utambitse ku burebure bw'ijisho ry'urabira. Utudomo twose tw'ukuzimira turi kuri wo (ku mirongo iteganye n'ubutaka).
kirundi.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Ibintu vyerekeza urabira bigaragara vyegeranye. Gushushanya ukuboko kwerekeza urabira = imbogamizi.
kirundi.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: Gabanya ikaraze/ifoto mu bice 9 bingana. Shira ibigenderwaho ku mahuriro kubera imiterere ikora.
kirundi.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Inguni y'izuba igena uburebure bw'igicucu + icerekezo. Inguni nto (isaha ya zahabu) = ibicucu birebire + ibara ryoroheje.
kirundi.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) yagaragaje uburebe bw'umurongo bw'imibare. Alberti yabushize mu buryo (1435).
kirundi.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Ibintu vya kure bigaragara vyubuye kandi bidasobanutse bitewe no gukwira kw'ikirere.
kirundi.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Imigenzo imwe ikoresha inguni + ibipimo vyihariye (amashusho ya geometiri y'Abayisilamu, mandala z'Abahindi, katedrali z'ikigotike).
kirundi.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Inguni z'amakunja + amashusho y'amakunja bitanga ibishushanyo vya 3D biva mu rupapuro rusanzuye.
kirundi.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Imiterere yerekana kwisa-nyawe ku rugero rwose. Yiswe na Benoît Mandelbrot (1975) iva mu kilatini fractus, "cavunitse".
kirundi.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Geometiri ku buso bugoramye. Iciyumviro-shingiro c'imirongo iteganye ca Euclide ntigikora. Vyavumbuwe mu myaka ya 1820 (Lobatchevski, Bolyai, Gauss).
kirundi.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Ibivugwa vyinshi bizwi ku gipimo ca zahabu mu bugeni, ubwubatsi, no mu "bwiza" ntibishigikiwe canke vyahimbwe nyuma. Ibiranga vy'imibare ni ukuri + biryoshe; ibivugwa vy'umuco kenshi si ukuri.
kirundi.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami ihuza geometiri n'ubwubatsi, ibinyabuzima, no gushushanya. Ivyiyumviro vy'imibare bigenga amakunja ashoboka.
kirundi.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Ubuhanga bwinshi bwa siporo buterwa n'inguni zo koherera. Iryo risanzwe "45° ni yo nziza" ni ukuri gusa ku bintu vyoherejwe + bigwa ku burebure bumwe (nta guhangana n'umuyaga).
